title: Canadian Nutrient File, 2026 - Open Government Portal
content:
## Canadian Nutrient File, 2026
The Canadian Nutrient File is Health Canada’s standard reference food composition database that provides nutrient values for foods commonly consumed in Canada.
- Publisher - Current Organization Name: Health Canada
- Licence: Open Government Licence - Canada
- All Resource Data ZIP English French dataset ZIP Explore More information Download
- Food Name CSV English French dataset CSV Explore Preview Download
- Food Source CSV English French dataset CSV Explore Preview Download
- CNF Food Group CSV English French dataset CSV Explore Preview Download
- Nutrient Amount CSV English French dataset CSV Explore Preview Download
- Nutrient Name CSV English French dataset CSV Explore Preview Download
- Nutrient Source CSV English French dataset CSV Explore Preview Download
- Measure Weight Conversion CSV English French dataset CSV Explore Preview Download
- Measure Type CSV English French dataset CSV Explore Preview Download
- Measure Name CSV English French dataset CSV Explore Preview Download
